title: Turkish-Style Scrambled Eggs
description: A twist on traditional scrambled eggs, this Turkish-Style Scrambled Eggs dish combines the richness of eggs with the bold flavors of Turkish cuisine.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a fork.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the savory, scrambled, and Turkish spices to the pan and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
Pour the whisked eggs into the pan and stir gently.
Cook the eggs for 3-4 minutes or until they start to set.
Reduce the heat to low and continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes or until the eggs are cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot with your favorite sides or on its own.
